buildCommand: if [ -f build-packages.js ]; then node build-packages.js && cd frontend; else cd .. && npm install --include=dev && node build-packages.js && cd frontend; fi && npm install && npm run build
installCommand: if [ -f ../package.json ] && [ ! -f build-packages.js ]; then cd .. && npm install --include=dev && npm install tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer --save-dev --no-package-lock; else npm install --include=dev; fi
